text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and Super Creek may not be
competing in the Takarazuka Kinen, but there are
other racers who'll make this race a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Inari One hypes herself up for the battle. She must beat everyone here today if she hopes to become Umamusume of the Year.
